allow: PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\boxphone-project\\scripts\\deploy-windows.bat"\); Write-Host "BOM check - First 4 bytes:"; $bytes[0..3] | ForEach-Object { "{0:X2}" -f $_ }; $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\("C:\\boxphone-project\\scripts\\deploy-windows.bat", [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $lines = $content -split "`n"; Write-Host "Line 24 \(raw\): $\($lines[23] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToCharArray\(\) | ForEach-Object { [int]$_ } } | Join-String -Separator ','\)")

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\boxphone-project\\scripts\\deploy-windows.bat"\); $hasLF = $false; $hasCRLF = $false; for\($i=0; $i -lt $bytes.Length-1; $i++\) { if\($bytes[$i] -eq 13 -and $bytes[$i+1] -eq 10\) { $hasCRLF = $true } elseif\($bytes[$i] -eq 10 -and \($i -eq 0 -or $bytes[$i-1] -ne 13\)\) { $hasLF = $true } }; Write-Host "Has CRLF: $hasCRLF"; Write-Host "Has Unix LF only: $hasLF")

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-Command","Start-Service MongoDB; Set-Service MongoDB -StartupType Automatic; Write-Output 'MongoDB started and set to Auto'; Get-Service MongoDB" -Verb RunAs -Wait)
